Dialog.name: MSG_708_100
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 1 0 6}I think that's the Shadow's main body floating up there...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_708_110
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 5 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 2 0 6}If it's that high, your attacks won't have the range to reach it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_708_120
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 3 0 6}Wait, but... I'm picking up similar readings from those statues down there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_708_130
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 4 0 6}There's a connection with the floating target, I'm sure of it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_708_000
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Not even my arrows can reach that far...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_708_200
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 5 0 6}The main body is down! It looks like it loses the ability to fly when you take out those statues.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_708_210
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 6 0 6}This is your chance to attack! Give it everything you've got![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_708_002
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}The Shadow is back in the air! You can't attack it anymore![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_708_300
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 7 0 6}I'm getting an unusual energy reading from the main body...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_708_310
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 8 0 6}Ah! It's getting more aggressive! Watch out for stronger attacks![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_708_400
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 9 0 6}I'm picking up a powerful reading from this statue...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_708_410
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 10 0 6}This one's not like the others. Let's do what we can to take it down![n]{f 1 1}
